baseline.transcript: My bedroom has a table, study table, a TV, some lights, a bed, some almirahs for the clothes and it has a window. We also have a piano in our room and I have green, blue, grey curtains, some pictures, a fan and a lot of miniature toys and some stuffed toys as well. and i also have a lot of books in my room and my almira has a lot of stickers on it as well currently my bed has a blue bed sheet and a very cute little chair to sit on it is pink in color

test.transcript: Hello, my name is Radushi and I am currently in my third year of B.Tech in Computer Science with a specialization in AIML. I work with AI agents, deep learning, machine learning models. I really like doing the Kegel contest every week and for my interest, I like to write. I have a blog where I write about life and whatever I do in my day I write there and I want to work as an AI researcher or an AI engineer in coming two three years so yes that is it thank you so much
